message:
chore: add fallback logging and edge case tests

- Added fallback logging functions in generated scripts for when
  logging.sh is not found (improves standalone usability)
- Regenerated all scripts/generated/*.sh with fallback logging
- Added edge case tests for manifest parser (test-edge-cases.ts)
